sentences.target: Dein Zeug liegt überall im Wohnzimmer.

translations.de: Dein Zeug liegt überall im Wohnzimmer.
translations.en: Your stuff is lying all over the living room.
translations.es: Tus cosas están por toda la sala.
translations.fr: Tes affaires traînent partout dans le salon.
translations.it: Le tue cose sono sparse in tutto il salotto.
translations.ko: 네 물건들이 거실에 여기저기 널브러져 있어.
translations.zh-Hans: 你的东西在客厅里到处都是。
translations.yue: 你啲嘢喺客廳到處都係。
translations.ru: Твои вещи разбросаны по всей гостиной.
translations.pt: As suas coisas estão espalhadas pela sala.
translations.vi: Đồ đạc của bạn vương vãi khắp phòng khách.
translations.ar: أغراضك مبعثرة في كل أرجاء غرفة المعيشة.
translations.nl: Je spullen liggen door de hele woonkamer.
translations.uk: Твої речі розкидані по всій вітальні.
translations.hu: A cuccaid szanaszét hevernek a nappaliban.
translations.hi: तुम्हारा सामान पूरे बैठक में बिखरा पड़ा है।
translations.pl: Twoje rzeczy leżą porozrzucane po całym salonie.
translations.el: Τα πράγματά σου είναι σκορπισμένα σε όλο το σαλόνι.
translations.nb: Sakene dine ligger overalt i stua.
translations.id: Barang-barangmu berserakan di seluruh ruang tamu.
translations.sv: Dina grejer ligger överallt i vardagsrummet.
translations.ro: Lucrurile tale sunt împrăștiate prin toată sufrageria.
translations.cs: Tvoje věci jsou rozházené po celém obýváku.
translations.da: Dine ting ligger overalt i stuen.
translations.ja: あなたのものが居間に散らばっている。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner (2nd person singular), agrees with neuter singular head noun; part of the subject NP in nominative.
Neuter singular common noun; head of the subject NP (nominative).
Finite lexical verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; main predicate, intransitive stative expressing location.
Locative adverb modifying the verb, indicating distribution of location.
Preposition (contraction of ‘in dem’) introducing a locative PP; takes dative for static location.
Neuter singular noun; object of the preposition ‘im’, dative case (static location).

sentences.target: Ich packe das Zeug später in die Kiste.
sentences.reading: /ɪç ˈpakə das tsɔʏ̯k ˈʃpɛːtɐ ɪn diː ˈkɪstə/

translations.de: Ich packe das Zeug später in die Kiste.
translations.ipa: /ɪç ˈpakə das tsɔʏ̯k ˈʃpɛːtɐ ɪn diː ˈkɪstə/
translations.en: I'll put the stuff in the box later.
translations.es: Luego meto las cosas en la caja.
translations.fr: Je mettrai les affaires dans la boîte plus tard.
translations.it: Più tardi metto la roba nella scatola.
translations.zh-Hans: 我待会儿把东西放进箱子里。
translations.yue: 我一陣將啲嘢擺入個箱度。
translations.ru: Я позже сложу вещи в коробку.
translations.pt: Depois coloco as coisas na caixa.
translations.he: אני אשים את הדברים בקופסה אחר כך.
translations.vi: Lát nữa tôi sẽ bỏ đồ vào thùng.
translations.nl: Ik doe de spullen later in de doos.
translations.uk: Я покладу речі в коробку пізніше.
translations.hu: Később bepakolom a cuccokat a dobozba.
translations.hi: मैं बाद में सामान डिब्बे में रख दूँगा।
translations.el: Θα βάλω τα πράγματα στο κουτί αργότερα.
translations.nb: Jeg legger tingene i boksen senere.
translations.id: Nanti aku taruh barang-barang ke dalam kotak.
translations.sv: Jag lägger grejerna i lådan senare.
translations.ro: Mai târziu pun lucrurile în cutie.
translations.da: Jeg lægger tingene i kassen senere.
translations.ja: 後で荷物を箱に入れる。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular, nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite lexical verb, present indicative, 1st person singular; transitive main verb.
Definite article, neuter singular accusative; determiner of the direct object NP.
Neuter singular noun; direct object of ‘packe’ (accusative).
Temporal adverb modifying the verb, indicating time of action.
Preposition indicating direction into; governs accusative here.
Definite article, feminine singular accusative; determiner of the PP object.
Feminine singular noun; object of the preposition ‘in’ (accusative, directional).

sentences.target: Lena sucht ihr Zeug vor dem Training.
sentences.reading: /ˈleːna zʊxt iːɐ̯ tsɔʏ̯k foːɐ̯ deːm ˈtʁeːnɪŋ/

translations.de: Lena sucht ihr Zeug vor dem Training.
translations.ipa: /ˈleːna zʊxt iːɐ̯ tsɔʏ̯k foːɐ̯ deːm ˈtʁeːnɪŋ/
translations.en: Lena is looking for her stuff before practice.
translations.es: Lena está buscando sus cosas antes del entrenamiento.
translations.fr: Lena cherche ses affaires avant l'entraînement.
translations.it: Lena cerca la sua roba prima dell'allenamento.
translations.ko: 레나는 연습 전에 자기 물건을 찾고 있다.
translations.zh-Hans: 莉娜在训练前找她的东西。
translations.yue: Lena 練習前喺度搵自己啲嘢。
translations.ru: Лена ищет свои вещи перед тренировкой.
translations.pt: A Lena está procurando as coisas dela antes do treino.
translations.he: לנה מחפשת את הדברים שלה לפני האימון.
translations.vi: Lena đang tìm đồ của mình trước buổi tập.
translations.ar: لينا تبحث عن أغراضها قبل التمرين.
translations.nl: Lena zoekt haar spullen voor de training.
translations.uk: Лена шукає свої речі перед тренуванням.
translations.hu: Lena az edzés előtt keresi a cuccait.
translations.hi: लीना अभ्यास से पहले अपना सामान ढूंढ़ रही है।
translations.pl: Lena szuka swoich rzeczy przed treningiem.
translations.el: Η Λένα ψάχνει τα πράγματά της πριν την προπόνηση.
translations.nb: Lena leter etter tingene sine før trening.
translations.id: Lena sedang mencari barang-barangnya sebelum latihan.
translations.sv: Lena letar efter sina grejer före träningen.
translations.ro: Lena își caută lucrurile înainte de antrenament.
translations.cs: Lena hledá své věci před tréninkem.
translations.da: Lena leder efter sine ting før træning.
translations.ja: レナは練習の前に自分の荷物を探している。

tokens.explanation: Proper noun (personal name), singular nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite lexical verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; transitive main verb.
Possessive determiner (3rd person singular), agreeing with neuter singular noun; marks the possessor of the object NP.
Neuter singular noun; direct object of ‘sucht’ (accusative).
Preposition forming a temporal PP; governs dative.
Definite article, dative singular (neuter here); determiner of the PP object.
Neuter singular noun (loanword); object of the preposition ‘vor’ (dative), temporal complement.

sentences.target: Wir haben zu viel Zeug in der Küche.
sentences.reading: /viːɐ̯ ˈhaːbən tsuː fiːl tsɔʏ̯k ɪn deːɐ̯ ˈkʏçə/

translations.de: Wir haben zu viel Zeug in der Küche.
translations.ipa: /viːɐ̯ ˈhaːbən tsuː fiːl tsɔʏ̯k ɪn deːɐ̯ ˈkʏçə/
translations.en: We have too much stuff in the kitchen.
translations.es: Tenemos demasiadas cosas en la cocina.
translations.fr: On a trop d'affaires dans la cuisine.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们厨房里东西太多了。
translations.yue: 我哋廚房入面啲嘢太多喇。
translations.ru: У нас на кухне слишком много вещей.
translations.he: יש לנו יותר מדי דברים במטבח.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi có quá nhiều đồ đạc trong bếp.
translations.ar: لدينا أشياء كثيرة جدًا في المطبخ.
translations.nl: We hebben te veel spullen in de keuken.
translations.uk: У нас на кухні занадто багато речей.
translations.hu: Túl sok cuccunk van a konyhában.
translations.hi: हमारी रसोई में बहुत ज़्यादा सामान है।
translations.pl: Mamy za dużo rzeczy w kuchni.
translations.el: Έχουμε πάρα πολλά πράγματα στην κουζίνα.
translations.nb: Vi har altfor mye greier på kjøkkenet.
translations.id: Kami punya terlalu banyak barang di dapur.
translations.sv: Vi har alldeles för mycket grejer i köket.
translations.ro: Avem prea multe lucruri în bucătărie.
translations.cs: Máme v kuchyni příliš mnoho věcí.
translations.da: Vi har alt for mange ting i køkkenet.

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person plural, nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite lexical verb, present indicative, 1st person plural; expresses possession.
Degree adverb modifying the quantifier ‘viel’ to indicate excess.
Quantifier determiner modifying the noun; part of the object NP ‘zu viel Zeug’.

Feminine singular noun; object of the preposition ‘in’ (dative), locative complement.
